and FFS
HEPC_UNS_MEDICARE_EVER Hepatitis C - unspecified - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
HEPC_UNS_MEDICAID_EVER Hepatitis C - unspecified - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
HEPC_UNS_COMBINED_EVER Hepatitis C - unspecified - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
HEPD_COMBINED Hepatitis D - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
